title: Triton Perea Electric Shower 9.5kW (Opal 3, Aquasurge, Rosato)
features: Phased shutdown – Flushes through the excess hot water after use, preventing lime-scale build up within the shower
Push button power controls and separate temperature control dial
Five spray pattern rub clean shower head with curved chrome riser rail
Start/Stop button to select your favourite shower setting every time
Peace of mind - Two year parts and labour guarantee - UK only
description: The Perea offers a smart, sophisticated, look to your bathroom with its white/brushed steel effect finish. Its great looks are complimented by a chrome shower kit with curved riser rail and 5 spray pattern shower head. Will replace Opal 3, Aquasurge, Rosato
